content: Alice works as a senior software engineer at a small startup.
Alice has been vegetarian since she was 16.
Alice lives in a craftsman bungalow in Portland, Oregon.
Alice's sister Maria visits every summer; they hike Mt. Hood together.
Alice is allergic to bees; she carries an EpiPen.
Alice prefers Rust over Go for systems programming work.
Alice's favorite coffee shop is Stumptown on SE Division.
Alice plays bass in a weekend indie band called Coastal Drift.
Alice took up bouldering last year; her gym is The Circuit.
Alice's dog is a 4-year-old border collie named Pepper.
Ben teaches AP Physics at Cambridge Rindge and Latin School.
Ben qualified for the Boston Marathon at the 2024 Chicago race.
Ben lives in a Somerville triple-decker with two roommates.
Ben is fluent in Mandarin; he studied abroad at Tsinghua University.
Ben's favorite physicist is Richard Feynman.
Ben drinks a flat white every morning at Diesel Cafe.
Ben drives a 2010 Subaru Outback with a roof rack for cycling.
Ben is lactose intolerant but cheats on weekends for ice cream.
Ben's brother Adam is a marine biologist at Woods Hole.
Ben volunteers as a tutor at the Cambridge Community Center.
Cara works as a pediatric nurse at a hospital in Burlington.
Cara lives on a 12-acre property near Stowe with her partner Rosa.
Cara has been knitting since she was a child; she sells on Etsy.
Cara raises 8 chickens and gets fresh eggs every morning.
Cara is allergic to penicillin.
Cara grew up in Pittsburgh; both parents still live there.
Cara's favorite knitting yarn is Brooklyn Tweed Loft.
Cara is reading 'A Memory Called Empire' for her book club.
Dan works as a junior analyst at a Series-B-focused VC fund.
Dan surfs at Pacific Beach pier most mornings before work.
Dan has a Master's in Economics from UC Berkeley.
Dan drives a Toyota Tacoma with a rooftop tent for camping trips.
Dan's favorite restaurant is the carne asada burrito place near La Jolla.
Dan's dog Cooper is a 6-year-old golden retriever.
Dan is gluten-free since being diagnosed with celiac in 2022.
Dan plays pickup basketball on Sundays at Mission Beach courts.
Dan grew up in Albuquerque, New Mexico.
Dan tried sourdough baking during the pandemic; still does it weekly.
